pkgmetadata.longdescription: pi (pi-coding-agent) is a terminal coding agent with multi-model support, lifecycle hooks, and a TypeScript extension API. This ebuild builds the single-file binary from the upstream pi-mono monorepo source via bun --compile, mirroring upstream's build:binary script. Compare to dev-util/pi-coding-agent-bin from gentoo-zh, which ships the prebuilt release tarball.

use.flag: Pull in sys-apps/fd for the built-in find tool
